decisions.subject: toolchain
decisions.decision: Kokoro TTS + HyperFrames render + source-built FFmpeg, all local
decisions.rationale: explainer-video skill default; offline after cached setup

decisions.subject: arc
decisions.rationale: teaching how a game works; hook > context > 3 steps > meaning > recap

decisions.subject: narration
decisions.decision: Kokoro af_heart, speed 1.1, one WAV per scene
decisions.rationale: skill default voice; measured per-scene durations drive all timing

decisions.subject: bed
decisions.rationale: concept explainer; calm pacing reads better without a bed

decisions.subject: visual
decisions.decision: design-system light tokens; title/hook, step-chip, flow-diagram, recap components
decisions.rationale: dogfood the explainer-video-skill Claude Design system

decisions.subject: signoff
decisions.decision: demo production for the skill's own user; user is subject owner
decisions.rationale: no external owner signoff required before sharing as demo
